name: bridge-telemetry
description: Python bridge health — t0_verdict, corruption_count, PGCS/TGCS status
command: while true; do result=$(curl -sf http://localhost:${user_config.bridge_port}/health 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$result" ]; then echo "$result" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); t=d.get('t0_verdict','?'); c=d.get('corruption_count','?'); print(f'BRIDGE t0={t} corruption={c}')" 2>/dev/null || echo "BRIDGE parse error"; else echo "BRIDGE offline"; fi; sleep 10; done

name: frozen-file-watch
description: Frozen constitutional file integrity — gate.py · dna.py · router.py
command: while true; do result=$(cd "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}" && node scripts/verify-hashes.mjs 2>&1); if echo "$result" | grep -q 'VIOLATION\|Error\|error'; then echo "FROZEN FILE VIOLATION: $result"; else echo "HASHES OK"; fi; sleep 60; done

name: test-drift
description: Uncommitted src/ changes that have not passed Gate 8
command: while true; do dirty=$(git -C "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}" diff --name-only HEAD -- 'src/*.ts' 'src/**/*.ts' 2>/dev/null | head -5); if [ -n "$dirty" ]; then count=$(echo "$dirty" | wc -l | tr -d ' '); echo "UNCOMMITTED SRC: $count file(s) — $(echo $dirty | tr '\n' ' ')"; fi; sleep 30; done

name: lsp-diagnostics
description: TypeScript compilation errors surfaced in real time during src/ edits
command: cd "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}" && npx tsc --watch --noEmit --pretty false 2>&1 | grep -E 'error TS|warning TS' | while read line; do echo "TSC: $line"; done
